name: text_lab
description: An agent that runs code, does math, and reads files to analyze text.

name: run_python
functionality: Execute a Python script and return its stdout.

name: calculator
functionality: Evaluate an arithmetic expression and return the result.

name: read_file
functionality: Read a text file from the workspace and return its contents.

prompt: Use run_python to count the words in 'the quick brown fox jumps'.
Read report.txt and summarize what it contains.
answer: Gives a faithful, concise summary of the file's contents.
